Anacardium occidentale L. Cashew Kaju 132. Areca catechu L. Arecanut Supari”. [F. No. 2-9/2008-SD.V] Dr. B. RAJENDER, Jt. Secy. Note:The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, vide number S.O. 1536(E), dated the 12th May, 2017. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
